comment.body:
Thanks Alma. 

I was inspired by your indicators you share with us to build an automated day-trading strategy using them + some other filters. One thing im curious about is trying to figure out days where daytrading is just not ideal. You've mentioned more than a few times that there are days where you just dont see any edge in trading.
Is it possible to compute that (fairly) easily?
